description: The macOS system menu bar appears at the top of the screen, likely triggered by the user moving the cursor to the top edge of the display.
frame_description: The browser window shows the Italy destination page on Smartraveller. The system menu bar (Chrome, File, Edit, etc.) becomes visible at the top.

description: The macOS system menu bar disappears from the top of the screen as the user moves the cursor away.
frame_description: The system menu bar at the top of the screen is hidden, returning the view to just the browser tabs and address bar.
